opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have had no energy for weeks, my joints ache terribly, and now my skin is turning yellow and my urine is dark.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The yellowing of my skin and eyes started this week and it's frightening me, and I'm completely wiped out and can't work.

symptom_narrative.onset: the exhaustion, poor appetite and mild nausea crept in over about the last 3 weeks; the yellow skin and dark urine appeared in the past week
symptom_narrative.duration: roughly 3 weeks of feeling run down, with the yellowing over the last 7 days
symptom_narrative.character: bone-deep tiredness with no appetite and a bit of queasiness; before the yellowing I had a run of feeling feverish with achy joints that seemed to move around, and a faint blotchy rash came up on my chest and back
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst fatigue I've ever had — I can't get off the couch or do my job
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: a dull ache under the ribs on the right side, plus the aching joints and the rash on my trunk
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: gradual and steadily worsening rather than sudden
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really, resting doesn't lift the tiredness
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it has just slowly built up on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: yellow eyes and skin, dark tea-coloured urine, poor appetite, mild nausea, low-grade fevers earlier on, moving joint aches, a faint rash on the trunk
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: unable to work, resting on the couch all day from the exhaustion

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: generally healthy, no ongoing liver or medical problems that I know of

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: works in healthcare; had a needle-stick injury at work about 3 months ago that I never formally reported at the time; very worried about what this could mean long term

objective_data_offered.value: the whites of my eyes and my skin look clearly yellow
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/self-camera impression under variable lighting, not a clinician assessment

objective_data_offered.value: my urine has gone dark, like tea or cola
a faint blotchy pink rash is fading on my chest and back
I felt feverish earlier in the week but haven't measured a temperature
about 70 kg on my home scales
